summary: Contributed to the development of a production web application as part of an Agile development team.
responsibilities: Developed and integrated a web-based coaching workflow module using React, TypeScript, and RESTful APIs.
Built responsive frontend interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS.
Developed backend services with Node.js, TypeScript, MySQL, and Prisma ORM.
Wrote unit and integration tests using Vitest.
Collaborated with stakeholders during requirements gathering and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
